series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Schools Management Plans for Asbest
series_metadata.series_description: Asbestos management plans for each school building in the state of Ohio. (Mandate Pl. 99-519) (HR 5073:10/22/86).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years after program reviews and evaluations are completed and plan approved. If not accepted by state library or State Archives, then destroy., Paper: Archives
